title: Trick-Or-Treat For All 2024
summary: Join us for our annual Trick-Or-Treat For All event! Businesses along the corridor participate in giving out Halloween goodies, plus a pet costume contest.
body:
Join us on Saturday, October 26th at 1pm for our annual Trick-Or-Treat For All event!

Participate as a Business — Register to participate and give out Halloween goodies to trick-or-treaters along the corridor.

Pet Costume Contest — Enter your pet in this year's costume contest!
